title: First Light
subtitles:
1
00:00:05,000 --> 00:00:06,500
[Rel] Man, this honey bun is $2.75?! In THIS economy? Yo, I'm writing my congressman.

2
00:00:06,500 --> 00:00:08,000
[Jace] You ain't writing nobody. Pick your snack and let's go.

3
00:00:08,000 --> 00:00:09,500
[Rel] Aight, aight — but real talk though. Some dude named Dre been asking 'bout you. West side type. Clean but... off.

4
00:00:09,500 --> 00:00:11,000
[Jace] I don't know no Dre.

5
00:00:11,000 --> 00:00:13,500
[Nia] Heaven knows... I've been waiting on this... mmhmm...

6
00:00:13,500 --> 00:00:16,000
[Nia] Oh my God. Oh my GOD.

7
00:00:16,000 --> 00:00:17,500
[Nia] Kingdom Records, Jace. They actually listened. They want to meet me next week.

8
00:00:17,500 --> 00:00:19,000
[Jace] I told you. I been told you. Wasn't nobody gonna sleep on that voice.

9
00:00:19,000 --> 00:00:20,500
[Nia] You good? You got that look again.

10
00:00:20,500 --> 00:00:22,000
[Jace] I'm good. Just handling business.

11
00:00:22,000 --> 00:00:23,500
[Dre] Tell your cousin Marcus made a deal with the feds. His name's in it. He's got seventy-two hours to decide what he wants to do about that.

12
00:00:23,500 --> 00:00:25,000
[Rel] ...

13
00:00:25,000 --> 00:00:26,500
[Dre] Have a good night, little cousin.

14
00:00:26,500 --> 00:00:28,000
[Rel] Jace... pick up. Jace, pick up the phone, bro. It's about Marcus.

15
00:00:28,000 --> 00:00:29,666
[Uncle] Jace. Sit down, nephew.

16
00:00:29,666 --> 00:00:31,332
[Jace] I'm standing.

17
00:00:31,332 --> 00:00:32,998
[Uncle] Then you already know.
